title: B14_BLURBS_REQUESTED
description: Intelligence block for requested blurbs (short or email format)

id.description: Unique identifier for this blurb (e.g., BLB-001)

subject.description: What/who the blurb is about (V, Careerspan, other topic)

subject_detail.description: If subject=Other, specify what (e.g., 'Career Framework Workshop')

recipient.description: Who will receive/use this blurb (name or role)

audience_context.description: Who the recipient will share this with (e.g., 'Enterprise HR team')

purpose.description: Why this blurb is needed (e.g., 'Product overview for leadership')

generated_at.description: ISO timestamp when blurb was generated

output_file.description: Relative path to generated blurb file
